text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It goes beyond simply reading words; NLP enables machines to understand context, grammar, and meaning. This technology powers many common tools, such as online translation services that convert one language to another and sentiment analysis programs that identify the emotion behind a text, like whether a review is positive or negative. Another everyday use of NLP is in chatbots, which can hold conversations with users to answer questions or provide customer support. By combining text understanding with machine learning, NLP continues to improve how we interact with technology.
